visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens with a extreme close-up shot of a white price tag in a retail warehouse. A hand with a green jade ring points to a price of $500. A large red and blue logo is overlaid at the top. The background consists of blurred frozen food items on industrial metal shelves. (2) The camera pans out to a medium shot showing a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light purple pleated blouse and a black vest. She holds two sealed packages of orange-colored smoked salmon. She is smiling and gesturing with her hands while looking towards the camera. The setting is a brightly lit supermarket aisle with shelves of food. (3) The shot changes to a close-up of the smoked salmon packaging. The label shows text in English and Traditional Chinese. A finger points to the 'use by' date printed on the transparent plastic. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a commercial environment. (4) The woman is shown again in a medium shot, standing in front of the refrigerated shelves. She is holding the salmon packages and talking animatedly. Various food products in cardboard boxes are visible in the background. (5) The final phase returns to a close-up of the price tag and the salmon packages being held together. Yellow and blue text overlays appear at the bottom of the screen, summarizing the value of the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 限時特價 超便宜燻鮭魚. [Subtitle]: 你是銷售人員嗎. (2) [Subtitle]: 原價799現在只要500塊. (3) [Subtitle]: 折了299元. (4) [Variety]: 太便宜了吧. (5) [Subtitle]: 兩袋哦 燻鮭魚 我跟你們說 外面的沙拉一堆 才兩片就要收你580了. (6) [Variety]: 經濟實惠的好妹妹. (7) [Subtitle]: 比方說如果有效期剩不到一個月 會直接變成300多. (8) [Subtitle]: 嗯 那現在是剩多久呢. (9) [Subtitle]: 這個到8/20 其實還有半年. (10) [Subtitle]: 還有半年. (11) [Subtitle]: 這個大概在我們家不到半個禮拜就不見了. (12) [Subtitle]: 我們在桃園南崁店 大家也趕快來撿便宜. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為真的很划算. (14) [Subtitle]: 沙拉 三明治 開胃菜 或貝果. (15) [Subtitle]: 自己用真的很划算.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One female protagonist is clearly visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a lavender-colored high-neck pleated top and a black sleeveless vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of industrial-style refrigerated shelves in a Costco warehouse, stocked with various packaged meat and frozen food products like pulled pork and salmon.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright synth chord and an upbeat drum beat. A male voice asks a question with high curiosity, followed immediately by a female voice responding with a cheerful, energetic tone. The female voice explains the price reduction with high pitch variability. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect highlights the mention of the price. The female voice continues at a rapid speech rate, comparing current prices to other market options. The background music maintains a consistent, high-energy pop rhythm with synth textures. (3) The female voice shifts slightly to a lower, more explanatory tone as she discusses the expiration date. The male voice interjects with an impressed exclamation. The ambient noise of the supermarket is audible but kept well below the main vocal signal. (4) The dialogue concludes with the female speaker providing a recommendation and stating the store's location. The music swells slightly towards the end with a final percussive hit, maintaining a high positive valence and arousal throughout the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional product showcase and 'bargain hunting' guide. It utilizes a high-energy, vlog-style interaction between an interviewer and a subject to highlight a significant price discount on smoked salmon at Costco. The strategic intent is to drive foot traffic to the specific Nankan branch by emphasizing the value proposition and the generous remaining shelf life of the discounted items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video specifically mentions the store name, shows the brand logo clearly, and focuses entirely on promoting the value of a specific product sold there.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles (subtitles, sound effects, high-energy music) to make mundane grocery shopping appear exciting and urgent.
